cleavage agent: 600 ng of mass spectrometry grade Trypsin/LysC mix
collision energy: collision energy of 10 V and cell accelerator voltage of 5 V
fragmentation method: the mass spectrometer was operated in a data-dependent mode using HCD fragmentation for MS/MS spectra generation
instrument: using an Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer
ionization type: Mass spectrometry analysis was performed using electrospray ionization (ESI) in negative mode
